name: Archangel's Staff

passives.name: Manaflow
passives.effects: Grants a charge every 8 seconds, up to 5 charges. Affecting an enemy or ally with an [[champion ability|ability]] consumes a charge to grant {{as|5 '''bonus''' mana}}, increased to {{as|10|mana}} if they are a champion, up to a '''maximum''' of {{as|360 '''bonus''' mana}}.

effects_structured.raw: Gain AP equal to 1% bonus mana.
Manaflow: gain charges every 8s up to 5; ability use consumes charge to grant bonus mana (5/10) up to 360.

simpleDescription: Increases Ability Power based on maximum Mana

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Shop sell value was corrected to Tier-1 canonical dataset/page values during Tear-line sibling review.
Verified Manaflow timing and consumption model against page-level source: one charge every 8s (max 5), consumed when an ability affects an enemy or ally, with champion-target bonus mana branch.
Transform semantics note: conversion to Seraph's Embrace occurs at 360 bonus mana threshold.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
